overall.description: A third-person game scene showing a hooded character in dark clothing walking through a snowy mountain landscape. The character traverses from an open trail with pine trees toward rock formations, then along a ridge with expansive snow-capped mountain views, before entering a dark abandoned ruin area with scattered debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain trail approaching large rock outcrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through snow-covered terrain toward a large rock formation ahead

entered.detail: tall dark rock outcrop covered in patches of snow, dominating the path ahead
evergreen trees with snow-laden branches lining the left side of the trail
evergreen trees with snow-laden branches lining the right side of the trail
leafless tree trunk with bare branches against the snowy landscape

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide snowy mountain trail flanked by snow-covered pine trees. A large rock formation looms ahead in the center of the path, while distant snowy peaks are visible on the left horizon. The lighting is diffuse under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain ridge with panoramic views

events.description: passing the large rock formation into open mountain vista with expansive views
emerging from shadow into brighter sunlight as the path opens to the ridge

agents.ego_description: walking along the mountain path passing wooden debris and a weathered signpost while admiring the vista

entered.detail: old wooden barrel with metal bands sitting beside the path
wicker basket placed on the ground next to the barrel
tall wooden post with directional signs pointing along the trail
majestic snow-covered mountain range visible in the distance
steep rocky hillside with sparse vegetation rising on the right

segments.scene_description: The character passes the rock formation and continues along an open mountain ridge. A wooden barrel and basket sit beside the path, while a signpost marks the trail. Expansive snow-capped mountains become visible on the left, and the terrain opens up to reveal panoramic views of the surrounding peaks.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned ruin site with scattered debris and broken structures

events.description: entering dark enclosed ruin area with broken wooden structures and scattered debris
slowing pace to navigate through debris-filled area and examine surroundings

agents.ego_description: carefully walking through the dark ruin area examining scattered debris, broken barrels, and stone foundations

entered.detail: shadowy entrance to an abandoned ruin area with overhanging rock formations
collapsed wooden beams and planks from destroyed buildings
various scattered objects including broken pottery, tools, and wooden fragments covering the snow
weathered stone walls and foundations of collapsed structures
large fallen tree trunks lying across the snowy ground

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker, sheltered ruin area where the sky is partially obscured by overhanging rocks. The ground is littered with debris from abandoned structures including broken wooden beams, stone foundations, and scattered objects. The lighting becomes significantly darker as the character explores this enclosed space, navigating around fallen trees and ruined walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy mountain trail that gradually opens into a panoramic ridge view. It begins with the character walking past snow-covered pine trees under a diffuse, cloudy sky, moving toward a large rock formation that looms in the center of the path. As the character passes the rock, the terrain expands and the scene shifts toward an open mountain ridge marked by a wooden barrel, a basket, and a signpost. The view then opens wide to reveal expansive, snow-capped peaks on the left horizon, finally transitioning into a sweeping panoramic vista of the surrounding mountain range.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character transitions from the open mountain landscape into the oppressive atmosphere of a sheltered ruin. It begins with the character entering a darker, enclosed area where the expansive sky is gradually obscured by heavy overhanging rocks. As the camera moves deeper into the space, the lighting dims significantly, shifting the mood toward one of isolation and decay. The scene then navigates through a cluttered environment of broken wooden beams and stone foundations, weaving around fallen trees and ruined walls before settling into the depths of the abandoned structure.
